title: Interstellar
plot: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival as Earth faces environmental collapse.

title: The Matrix
plot: A computer hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

title: Inception
plot: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O.

title: Gravity
plot: Two astronauts work together to survive after an accident leaves them stranded in space, drifting with no way to return home.

title: The Martian
plot: An astronaut becomes stranded on Mars after his team assumes him dead, and must rely on his ingenuity to find a way to signal that he is alive.

title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
plot: Humanity finds a mysterious object buried beneath the lunar surface and sets off on a quest to find its origins with the help of an intelligent computer.

title: Arrival
plot: A linguist is recruited by the military to communicate with alien lifeforms after twelve mysterious spacecraft appear around the world.

title: Avatar
plot: A paraplegic Marine dispatched to the moon Pandora on a unique mission becomes torn between following his orders and protecting the world he feels is his home.

title: Star Wars: A New Hope
plot: Luke Skywalker joins forces with a Jedi Knight, a cocky pilot, a Wookiee and two droids to save the galaxy from the Empire's world-destroying battle station.

title: Blade Runner 2049
plot: A young blade runner's discovery of a long-buried secret leads him to track down former blade runner Rick Deckard, who's been missing for thirty years.

title: The Dark Knight
plot: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests of his ability to fight injustice.

title: Avengers: Endgame
plot: After the devastating events of Infinity War, the Avengers assemble once more in order to reverse Thanos's actions and restore balance to the universe.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
plot: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners, a psychotic worshiper, and a drifter named Max.

title: John Wick
plot: An ex-hit-man comes out of retirement to track down the gangsters that killed his dog and took his car.

title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
plot: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team, along with some familiar allies, race against time after a mission gone wrong.

title: Die Hard
plot: An off-duty cop tries to save his wife and several others taken hostage by terrorists during a Christmas party at a skyscraper.

title: Speed
plot: A young police officer must prevent a bomb exploding aboard a city bus by keeping its speed above 50 mph.

title: The Bourne Identity
plot: A man is picked up by a fishing boat, bullet-riddled and with no memory. He uses his physical and mental skills to discover his past while being chased by assassins.

title: Gladiator
plot: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery.

title: Top Gun: Maverick
plot: After thirty years, Maverick is still pushing the envelope as a top naval aviator, but must confront ghosts of his past when he leads TOP GUN's best graduates for a specialized mission.

title: Titanic
plot: A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard the luxurious, ill-fated R.M.S. Titanic.

title: The Notebook
plot: A poor yet passionate young man falls in love with a rich young woman, giving her a sense of freedom, but they are quickly torn apart by their different social worlds.

title: Pride and Prejudice
plot: Sparks fly when spirited Elizabeth Bennet meets single, rich, and proud Mr. Darcy. But Mr. Darcy reluctantly finds himself falling in love with a woman beneath his class.

title: La La Land
plot: While navigating their careers in Los Angeles, a pianist and an actress fall in love while attempting to reconcile their aspirations for the future.

title: Before Sunrise
plot: A young man and woman meet on a train in Europe and spend one night together in Vienna, knowing that it may be their only opportunity to meet.

title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
plot: When their relationship turns sour, a couple undergoes a medical procedure to have each other erased from their memories.

title: Casablanca
plot: A cynical expatriate American cafe owner struggles to decide whether or not to help his former lover and her fugitive husband escape the Nazis in French Morocco.

title: About Time
plot: At the age of 21, Tim discovers he can travel in time and change what happens and has happened in his past, and uses this ability to find love.

title: Forrest Gump
plot: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the Vietnam War, the Watergate scandal and other historical events unfold from the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
plot: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

title: Schindler's List
plot: In German-occupied Poland during World War II, industrialist Oskar Schindler gradually becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce after witnessing their persecution by the Nazis.

title: The Godfather
plot: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son.

title: Good Will Hunting
plot: Will Hunting, a janitor at MIT, has a gift for mathematics but needs help from a psychologist to find direction in his life.

title: A Beautiful Mind
plot: After John Nash, a brilliant but asocial mathematician, accepts secret work in cryptography, his life takes a turn for the nightmarish.

title: The Imitation Game
plot: During World War II, the English mathematical genius Alan Turing tries to crack the German Enigma code with help from fellow mathematicians.

title: 12 Angry Men
plot: A jury holdout attempts to prevent a miscarriage of justice by forcing his colleagues to reconsider the evidence in a murder trial.

title: Parasite
plot: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.

title: Whiplash
plot: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are mentored by an instructor who will stop at nothing to realize a student's potential.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
plot: A young F.B.I. cadet must receive the help of an incarcerated and manipulative cannibal killer to help catch another serial killer.

title: Se7en
plot: Two detectives, a rookie and a veteran, hunt a serial killer who uses the seven deadly sins as his motive.

title: Gone Girl
plot: With his wife's disappearance having become the focus of an intense media circus, a man sees the spotlight turned on him when it's suspected that he may not be innocent.

title: Shutter Island
plot: In 1954, a U.S. Marshal investigates the disappearance of a murderer who escaped from a hospital for the criminally insane.

title: Memento
plot: A man with anterograde amnesia, an inability to form new memories, seeks to find his wife's murderer using photographs and notes.

title: Rear Window
plot: A wheelchair-bound photographer spies on his neighbours from his apartment window and becomes convinced one of them has committed murder.

title: Psycho
plot: A Phoenix secretary embezzles $40,000 from her employer's client, goes on the run, and checks into a remote motel run by a young man under the domination of his mother.

title: The Conjuring
plot: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren work to help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their farmhouse.

title: Get Out
plot: A young African-American visits his white girlfriend's parents for the weekend, where his uneasiness about their reception of him eventually reaches a boiling point.

title: Hereditary
plot: A grieving family is haunted by tragic and disturbing occurrences after the death of their secretive grandmother.

title: A Quiet Place
plot: In a post-apocalyptic world, a family is forced to live in near silence while hiding from monsters with an acute sense of hearing.

title: The Exorcist
plot: When a teenager is possessed by a mysterious entity, her mother seeks the help of two priests to save her daughter.

title: Jurassic Park
plot: A pragmatic paleontologist visiting an almost complete theme park is tasked with protecting a couple of kids after a power failure causes the park's cloned dinosaurs to run loose.

title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
plot: Archaeologist and adventurer Indiana Jones is hired by the US government to find the Ark of the Covenant before the Nazis.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
plot: A meek Hobbit from the Shire and eight companions set out on a journey to destroy the powerful One Ring and save Middle-earth from the Dark Lord Sauron.

title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
plot: An orphaned boy enrolls in a school of wizardry, where he learns the truth about himself, his family and the terrible evil that haunts the magical world.

title: The Chronicles of Narnia
plot: Four kids travel through a wardrobe to the land of Narnia and learn of their destiny to free it with the guidance of a mystical lion.

title: Pan's Labyrinth
plot: In the falangist Spain of 1944, the bookish young stepdaughter of a sadistic army officer escapes into an eerie but captivating fantasy world.

title: The Lion King
plot: Lion prince Simba and his father are targeted by his bitter uncle, who wants to ascend the throne himself.

title: Toy Story
plot: A cowboy doll is profoundly threatened and jealous when a new spaceman figure supplants him as top toy in a boy's room.

title: WALL-E
plot: In the distant future, a small waste-collecting robot inadvertently embarks on a space journey that will ultimately decide the fate of mankind.

title: Up
plot: 78-year-old Carl Fredricksen travels to Paradise Falls in his house equipped with balloons, inadvertently taking a young stowaway along for the ride.

title: Spirited Away
plot: During her family's move to the suburbs, a sulky 10-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits.

title: Princess Mononoke
plot: On a journey to find the cure for a Tatarigami's curse, Ashitaka finds himself in the middle of a war between the forest gods and Tatara Town.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
plot: The adventures of Gustave H, a legendary concierge at a famous European hotel between the wars, and Zero Moustafa, the lobby boy who becomes his most trusted friend.

title: Knives Out
plot: A detective investigates the death of a patriarch of an eccentric, combative family.

title: The Big Lebowski
plot: Jeff 'The Dude' Lebowski, mistaken for a millionaire of the same name, seeks restitution for his ruined rug and is drawn into a convoluted plan.

title: Groundhog Day
plot: A weatherman finds himself inexplicably living the same day over and over again.

title: Catch Me If You Can
plot: A true story about Frank Abagnale Jr. who, before his 21st birthday, successfully conned millions of dollars' worth of checks as a Pan Am pilot, doctor, and legal prosecutor.

title: Ocean's Eleven
plot: Danny Ocean and his ten accomplices plan to rob three Las Vegas casinos simultaneously.

title: Pulp Fiction
plot: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife, and a pair of diner bandits interweave in four tales of violence and redemption.

title: No Country for Old Men
plot: Violence and mayhem ensue after a hunter stumbles upon a drug deal gone wrong and more than two million dollars in cash near the Rio Grande.

title: There Will Be Blood
plot: A story of family, religion, hatred, oil and madness, focusing on a turn-of-the-century prospector in the early days of the business.

title: Fight Club
plot: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soapmaker form an underground fight club that evolves into something much, much more.

title: American Beauty
plot: A sexually frustrated suburban father has a mid-life crisis after becoming infatuated with his daughter's best friend.

title: The Truman Show
plot: An insurance salesman discovers his whole life is actually a reality TV show.

title: Oldboy
plot: After being inexplicably imprisoned for 15 years, Oh Dae-su is released, only to find he must find his captor in 5 days.

title: City of God
plot: In the slums of Rio, two kids' paths diverge as one struggles to become a photographer and the other a kingpin.

title: Amélie
plot: Amélie is an innocent and naive girl in Paris with her own sense of justice and who decides to help those around her find happiness.

title: Life is Beautiful
plot: When an open-minded Jewish librarian and his son become victims of the Holocaust, he uses a perfect mixture of will, humor, and imagination to protect his son.

title: Cinema Paradiso
plot: A filmmaker recalls his childhood when falling in love with the pictures at the cinema of his home village and forming a deep friendship with the cinema's projectionist.

title: Das Boot
plot: The claustrophobic world of a WWII German U-boat; boredom, filth, and sheer terror.

title: The Social Network
plot: As Harvard student Mark Zuckerberg creates the social networking site that would become known as Facebook, he is sued by the twins who claimed he stole their idea.

title: Moneyball
plot: Oakland A's general manager Billy Beane's successful attempt to assemble a baseball team on a lean budget by employing computer-generated analysis to acquire new players.

title: The Big Short
plot: In 2006-7 a group of investors bet against the US mortgage market. In their research they discover how flawed and corrupt the market is.

title: Margin Call
plot: Follows the key people at an investment bank over a 24-hour period during the early stages of the 2008 financial crisis.

title: Ex Machina
plot: A programmer is selected to participate in a ground-breaking experiment in synthetic intelligence by evaluating the human qualities of a highly advanced humanoid A.I.

title: Her
plot: In a near future, a lonely writer develops an unlikely relationship with an operating system designed to meet his every need.

title: Black Mirror: Bandersnatch
plot: A young programmer starts to question reality as he adapts a dark fantasy novel into a video game. A mind-bending tale with multiple endings.

title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence
plot: A highly advanced robotic boy longs to become real so that he can regain the love of his human mother.

title: I, Robot
plot: In 2035, a technophobic cop investigates a crime that may have been perpetrated by a robot, challenging the three laws of robotics.

title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
plot: A cyborg, identical to the one who failed to kill Sarah Connor, must now protect her teenage son John Connor from a more advanced and powerful cyborg.

title: Dune
plot: A noble family becomes embroiled in a war for control over the galaxy's most valuable asset while its scion fulfills his destiny among the desert people.

title: The Fifth Element
plot: In the colorful future, a cab driver unwittingly becomes the central figure in the search for a legendary cosmic weapon to keep Evil and Mr. Zorg at bay.

title: Minority Report
plot: In a future where a special police unit is able to arrest murderers before they commit their crimes, an officer from that unit is himself accused of a future murder.

title: Children of Men
plot: In 2027, in a chaotic world in which women have somehow become infertile, a former activist agrees to help transport a miraculously pregnant woman to a sanctuary at sea.

title: Elysium
plot: In the year 2154, the very wealthy live on a man-made space station while the rest of the population resides on a ruined Earth.

title: Total Recall
plot: A man goes to a virtual vacation memory service which instead shows him memories of being a spy on Mars. When he returns, he's chased by government agents.

title: The Thing
plot: A research team in Antarctica is hunted by a shape-shifting alien that assumes the appearance of its victims.

title: Alien
plot: After a space merchant vessel receives an unknown transmission as a distress call, one of the crew is attacked by a mysterious life form and they begin to realize that its life cycle has merely begun.

title: Predator
plot: A team of commandos on a mission in a Central American jungle find themselves hunted by an extraterrestrial warrior.

title: RoboCop
plot: In a dystopic and crime-ridden Detroit, a terminally wounded cop returns to the force as a powerful cyborg haunted by submerged memories.

title: Back to the Future
plot: Marty McFly, a 17-year-old high school student, is accidentally sent thirty years into the past in a time-traveling DeLorean invented by his close friend, the maverick scientist Doc Brown.

title: Groundhog Day
plot: A TV weatherman, narcissistic and cynical, finds himself re-living Groundhog Day repeatedly, only able to escape when he learns to be a better person.

title: Source Code
plot: A soldier wakes up in someone else's body and discovers he's part of an experimental government program to find the bomber of a commuter train.

title: Edge of Tomorrow
plot: A soldier fighting aliens gets to relive the same day over and over again, the day restarting every time he dies.

title: Looper
plot: In 2074, when the mob wants to get rid of someone, the target is sent into the past, where a hired gun awaits - someone like Joe - who one day learns the mob wants to 'close the loop' by sending back Joe's future self for assassination.

title: Primer
plot: Four friends/fledgling entrepreneurs, knowing that there's something bigger going on than they can fully understand, entrench themselves in a time-travel experiment.

title: About a Boy
plot: A single, childless man gets the idea of frequenting a single parent group to meet women, but finds out that he bonds more with a kid.

title: The Pursuit of Happyness
plot: A struggling salesman takes custody of his son as he's poised to begin a life-changing professional endeavour.

title: Pay It Forward
plot: A young boy attempts to make the world a better place after his teacher gives him that chance.

title: Dead Poets Society
plot: English teacher John Keating inspires his students to look at poetry with a different perspective of authentic knowledge and feelings.

title: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty
plot: When his job along with that of his co-worker are threatened, Walter takes action in the real world, embarking on a global journey that turns into an adventure more extraordinary than anything he could have ever imagined.

title: Into the Wild
plot: After graduating from Emory University, top student and athlete Christopher McCandless abandons his possessions, gives his entire $24,000 savings account to charity and hitchhikes to Alaska to live in the wilderness.

title: Wild
plot: A woman makes a solo journey on foot along the Pacific Crest Trail from the Mojave Desert through California and Oregon to Washington's Bridge of the Gods.

title: 127 Hours
plot: An adventurous mountain climber becomes trapped under a boulder while canyoneering alone near Moab, Utah and resorts to desperate measures in order to survive.

title: Cast Away
plot: A FedEx executive undergoes a physical and emotional transformation after crash landing on a deserted island.

title: The Revenant
plot: A frontiersman on a fur trading expedition in the 1820s fights for survival after being mauled by a bear and left for dead by members of his own hunting team.

title: Braveheart
plot: Scottish warrior William Wallace leads his countrymen in a rebellion to free his homeland from the tyranny of King Edward I of England.

title: Troy
plot: An adaptation of Homer's great epic, the film follows the assault on Troy by the united Greek forces and chronicles the fates of the men involved.

title: Spartacus
plot: The slave Spartacus leads a violent revolt against the decadent Roman Republic.

title: Ben-Hur
plot: After a Jewish prince is betrayed and sent into slavery by a Roman friend, he regains his freedom and comes back for revenge.

title: Lawrence of Arabia
plot: The story of T.E. Lawrence, the English officer who successfully united and led the diverse, often warring, Arab tribes during World War I.

title: The Bridge on the Drina
plot: A historical drama about a bridge built in Bosnia under Ottoman rule and its impact on the people living nearby over 400 years.

title: Saving Private Ryan
plot: Following the Normandy Landings, a group of U.S. soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper whose brothers have been killed in action.

title: Full Metal Jacket
plot: A pragmatic U.S. Marine observes the dehumanizing effects the Vietnam War has on his fellow recruits from their brutal boot camp training to the bloody street fighting in Hue.

title: Apocalypse Now
plot: A U.S. Army officer serving in Vietnam is tasked with assassinating a rogue Special Forces Colonel who sees himself as a god.

title: Hacksaw Ridge
plot: WWII American Army Medic Desmond T. Doss, who served during the Battle of Okinawa, refuses to kill people, and becomes the first man in American history to receive the Medal of Honor without firing a shot.

title: Dunkirk
plot: Allied soldiers from Belgium, the British Commonwealth and Empire, and France are surrounded by the German Army and evacuated during a fierce battle in World War II.
As a regiment assembles to wage war deep in enemy territory, two soldiers are assigned to race against time and deliver a message that will stop 1,600 men from walking straight into a deadly trap.

title: Joker
plot: A mentally troubled stand-up comedian embarks on a downward spiral that leads to the creation of an iconic villain.

title: Black Swan
plot: A committed dancer struggles to maintain her sanity after winning the lead role in a production of Tchaikovsky's Swan Lake.

title: Requiem for a Dream
plot: The drug-induced utopias of four Coney Island people are shattered when their addictions run deep.

title: Pi
plot: A paranoid mathematician searches for a key number that will unlock the universal patterns found in nature.

title: A Clockwork Orange
plot: In a near-future Britain, young Alex DeLarge and his gang engage in rape, torture and murder, and he's eventually jailed and volunteers for an experimental aversion therapy.

title: The Prestige
plot: After a tragic accident, two stage magicians in 1890s London engage in a battle to create the ultimate illusion while sacrificing everything they have to outwit each other.

title: The Sixth Sense
plot: A boy who communicates with spirits that don't know they're dead seeks the help of a disheartened child psychologist.

title: Signs
plot: A family living on a farm finds mysterious crop circles in their fields which suggests something more frightening to come.

title: The Village
plot: A series of events tests the beliefs of a small isolated countryside village in the mid-19th century.

title: Unbreakable
plot: A man learns that he is nearly indestructible following a train crash that kills all other passengers except him.

title: The Usual Suspects
plot: A sole survivor tells of the twisty events leading up to a horrific gun battle on a boat, which began when five criminals met at a seemingly random police lineup.

title: Lock, Stock and Two Smoking Barrels
plot: Four Cockney British working-class men pool their money together to enter a high-stakes card game, and have one week to repay their debts.

title: Snatch
plot: Unscrupulous boxing promoters, violent bookmakers, a Russian gangster, incompetent amateur robbers, and supposedly Jewish jewelers fight to track down a priceless stolen diamond.

title: Heat
plot: A group of professional bank robbers start to feel the heat from police when they unknowingly leave a clue at their latest heist.

title: Collateral
plot: A cab driver finds himself the hostage of an engaging contract killer as he's taken on a passenger's overnight killing spree through Los Angeles.

title: Drive
plot: A mysterious Hollywood stuntman and mechanic moonlights as a getaway driver and finds himself in trouble when he helps out his neighbour.

title: Baby Driver
plot: After being coerced into working for a crime boss, a young getaway driver finds himself taking part in a heist doomed to fail.

title: Nightcrawler
plot: When Louis Bloom, a driven man desperate for work, muscles into the world of L.A. crime journalism, he blurs the line between observer and participant to become the star of his own story.

title: Zodiac
plot: In the late 1960s/early 1970s, a San Francisco cartoonist becomes an amateur detective obsessed with the Zodiac Killer.

title: Prisoners
plot: When Keller Dover's daughter and her friend go missing, he takes matters into his own hands as the police pursue multiple leads.

title: Sicario
plot: An idealistic FBI agent is enlisted by a government task force to aid in the escalating war against drugs at the border area between the U.S. and Mexico.

title: Wind River
plot: A veteran game tracker teams with an FBI agent to investigate a murder on a Wyoming Indian reservation.

title: Arrival
plot: A linguist is recruited by the military to assist in translating alien communications. As she immerses herself in the work, she realizes the alien language has a profound impact on human perception of time.

title: Contact
plot: Dr. Ellie Arroway, after years of searching, finds conclusive radio proof of intelligent aliens, who send plans for a mysterious machine.

title: Sunshine
plot: A team of international astronauts are sent on a dangerous mission to reignite the dying Sun with a nuclear fission bomb in 2057.

title: Moon
plot: Astronaut Sam Bell has a quintessentially personal encounter toward the end of his three-year stint on the Moon, where he, working alongside his computer, GERTY, helps deliver a clean-energy source to a resource-depleted Earth.

title: The Rover
plot: 10 years after a global economic collapse, a cold drifter pursues the men who stole his car through an unforgiving Australian outback.

title: Beasts of No Nation
plot: A drama following the story of Agu, a child soldier fighting in the civil war of an unnamed African country.

title: Hotel Rwanda
plot: Paul Rusesabagina, a hotel manager, houses over a thousand Tutsis refugees during their struggle against the Hutu militia in Rwanda.

title: Blood Diamond
plot: A fisherman, a smuggler, and a syndicate of agitators are brought together over an uncut diamond that could change their lives forever.

title: The Last Samurai
plot: An American military advisor embraces the Samurai culture he was hired to destroy after being captured in battle.

title: Rush
plot: The merciless 1970s rivalry between Formula One rivals James Hunt and Niki Lauda.

title: Creed
plot: The former World Heavyweight Champion Rocky Balboa serves as a trainer and mentor to Adonis Johnson, the son of his late friend and former rival Apollo Creed.

title: Rocky
plot: A small-time boxer gets a supremely rare chance to fight a heavy-weight champion in a bout in which he strives to go the distance for his self-respect.

title: Million Dollar Baby
plot: A determined woman works with a hardened boxing trainer to become a professional.

title: The Wrestler
plot: An aging professional wrestler contemplates retirement after he suffers a heart attack.

title: Raging Bull
plot: The life of boxer Jake La Motta, whose violence and temper that led him to the top in the ring destroyed his life outside of it.

title: Coach Carter
plot: Controversy surrounds high school basketball coach Ken Carter after he locks out his undefeated team for breaking their academic contract.

title: Remember the Titans
plot: The true story of a newly appointed African-American coach and his high school team on their first season as a racially integrated unit.

title: The Blind Side
plot: The story of Michael Oher, a homeless and traumatized boy who became an All American football player and first round NFL draft pick with the help of a caring woman and her family.

title: Bohemian Rhapsody
plot: The story of the legendary rock band Queen and lead singer Freddie Mercury, leading up to their famous performance at Live Aid.

title: Walk the Line
plot: A chronicle of country music legend Johnny Cash's life, from his early days on an Arkansas cotton farm to his rise to fame with Sun Records in Memphis, Tennessee.

title: Control
plot: A look at the life of Ian Curtis, the enigmatic singer of Joy Division whose personal struggles with epilepsy and a failing marriage led to his tragic end.

title: Almost Famous
plot: A 15-year-old aspiring music journalist is assigned by Rolling Stone magazine to cover an up-and-coming rock band on their first arena tour.

title: School of Rock
plot: After being kicked out of his rock band, Dewey Finn becomes a substitute teacher of an uptight elementary private school, only to try and turn his class into a rock band.

title: Pitch Perfect
plot: A college freshman joins an all-girls a cappella group and helps them on their journey to regain their status.

title: Whiplash
plot: Under the tutelage of a ruthless instructor, a devoted student at a music conservatory discovers the true cost of greatness.

title: 8 Mile
plot: A young rapper, struggling with every aspect of his life, wants to make it big but his friends and foes make this odyssey of rap harder than it may seem.

title: Straight Outta Compton
plot: The group NWA emerges from the mean streets of Compton in Los Angeles, California, in the mid-1980s and revolutionizes Hip Hop culture with their music and tales about life in the hood.

title: Get Rich or Die Tryin'
plot: A young man looks to reconcile the history of his father while succeeding in the music world.

title: 8 Heads in a Duffel Bag
plot: A mobster tries to get back his bag of severed heads from a college student who accidentally grabbed it from the airport.

title: Mean Streets
plot: A small-time hood must choose between his mob associations or his girlfriend and mentally-unstable best friend.

title: Goodfellas
plot: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his relationship with his wife Karen Hill and his partners Jimmy Conway and Tommy DeVito in the Italian-American crime syndicate.

title: Casino
plot: A tale of greed, deception, money, power, and murder occur between two best friends: a mafia underboss and a casino owner.

title: The Departed
plot: An undercover cop and a mole in the police attempt to identify each other while working for a South Boston Irish gang chief.

title: Donnie Brasco
plot: An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and finds himself identifying more with the mafia life at the expense of his regular one.

title: Eastern Promises
plot: A London-based midwife investigates a dead girl's diary and gets entwined with the Russian Mafia.

title: A History of Violence
plot: Tom Stall, a quiet family man and owner of a local diner in a small Indiana town, is thrust into the spotlight after thwarting a robbery.

title: Killing Them Softly
plot: Jackie Cogan is a professional enforcer who investigates a heist that went down during a mob-protected poker game.

title: The Town
plot: An ex-con and his crew attempt their most daring robbery ever. Their plan is jeopardized, however, when the crew's leader falls in love with a bank manager connected to one of their earlier robberies.

title: Sicario: Day of the Soldado
plot: The drug war on the US-Mexico border has escalated as the cartels have begun trafficking terrorists across the US border. To fight the cartels, federal agent Matt Graver re-teams with the mercurial Alejandro.

title: Hell or High Water
plot: A divorced father and his ex-con older brother resort to a desperate scheme in order to save their family's farm in West Texas.

title: Logan Lucky
plot: Two brothers attempt to pull off a heist during a NASCAR race in North Carolina.

title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
plot: A mother personally challenges the local authorities to solve her daughter's murder when they fail to catch the culprit.

title: Spotlight
plot: The true story of how the Boston Globe uncovered the massive scandal of child molestation and cover-up within the local Catholic Archdiocese, shaking the entire Catholic Church to its core.

title: All the President's Men
plot: The story of how Washington Post reporters Bob Woodward and Carl Bernstein uncovered the scandal that led to the resignation of President Nixon.

title: The Post
plot: A cover-up that spanned four U.S. Presidents pushed the country's first female newspaper publisher and a hard-driving editor to join an unprecedented battle between the press and the government.

title: Frost/Nixon
plot: A dramatic retelling of the 1977 TV interviews between British talk-show host David Frost and former president Richard Nixon.

title: Lincoln
plot: As the Civil War continues to rage, America's president struggles with continuing carnage on the battlefield and as he fights with many inside his own cabinet on the question of abolishing slavery.

title: The King's Speech
plot: The story of King George VI of Great Britain, his impromptu ascension to the throne and the speech therapist who helped the unsure monarch become worthy of it.

title: Darkest Hour
plot: In May 1940, the fate of Western Europe hangs on the newly appointed British Prime Minister Winston Churchill, who must decide whether to negotiate with Hitler, or fight on.

title: Gandhi
plot: Biography of Mohandas K. Gandhi, the lawyer who became the famed leader of the Indian revolts against the British rule through his philosophy of nonviolent protest.
